text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Murgh... I just need to calm down and think
clearly. There must be a way to train in both form
and function...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was close. Half a step later, and I
would've run right into you.
choice_data_list: Be sure to watch where you're going.
Be sure to watch where you're going.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! Were you hurt? I was so lost in my
thoughts, I didn't realize you were there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's such a relief! And you're right, I'll have
to take care not to get distracted while walking
around.
choice_data_list: What were you thinking so hard about?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I've been trying to figure out what type
of training is best suited to me...
choice_data_list: How about choosing one and sticking to it?
Why not experiment with a bunch of methods?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Just because you water the ground
diligently doesn't mean seedlings will soon sprout.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: In other words, "a rose garden isn't built in a day."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, such words of wisdom! I'll have to write that
one down in my notebook later!
choice_data_list:
(That... sounds an awful lot like another
proverb...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right! The time for indecision is over! I'll
choose a single method and focus all my efforts
on it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Now that I'm free of distractions, I feel
like I can fully devote myself to training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't ever forget your kindness today. I promise
to pay you back when we meet next!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'll be seeing you, then! Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O runs off towards the training
gym.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. You have a point. I won't know what
method suits me if I don't try different ones.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: "The more you sow, the more you grow," right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now those are some wise words! I better
write that down before I forget.
choice_data_list: (Seems more like common sense to me...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm going to test out all the training
styles I can at school!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, the fog in my mind has lifted! I can
finally see the path forward!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't ever forget your kindness today. I promise
to pay you back when we meet next!
choice_data_list: Uh, don't worry about it. It's no big deal.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, it's the right thing to do. You really helped
me out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If you ever need help, please do not hesitate to
ask. It would be my pleasure to aid you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O smiles warmly at me, then
leaves.
